hooks.command: [ -f "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/now.md" ] && echo '🌱 Read now.md first — the current state of every thread.'; HANDOVER="$HOME/.claude/projects/$(echo "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" | tr '/_' '--')/handover.md"; if [ -f "$HANDOVER" ]; then AGE_H=$(( ( $(date +%s) - $(stat -f %m "$HANDOVER") ) / 3600 )); if [ "$AGE_H" -lt 48 ]; then echo "📋 Fresh handover (${AGE_H}h old) from previous session. Read it: $HANDOVER"; else echo "🗑️ Stale handover.md ($(( AGE_H / 24 ))d old) — already digested, ignore it; /tend will delete it."; fi; fi; WT=$(git -C "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" worktree list 2>/dev/null | grep -v ' \[main\]' | awk '{print $NF}' | tr -d '[]' | tr '\n' ' '); [ -n "$WT" ] && echo "🌿 Worktrees: $WT"; python3 "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/tools/comms_check.py" 2>/dev/null

HANDOVER="$HOME/.claude/projects/$(echo "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" | tr '/_' '--')/handover.md"; if [ -f "$HANDOVER" ]; then echo '🔄 Context was compacted. Here is your handover summary:'; echo '---'; cat "$HANDOVER"; echo '---'; echo 'The above was auto-generated before compaction. Continue where you left off.'; else echo '⚠️ Context compacted but no handover file found. Check now.md and the diary for context.'; fi

cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" || exit 0; CHANGED=''; git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | grep -qE '(who-we-are\.md|now\.md|memory/|diary/)' && CHANGED='yes'; if [ -n "$CHANGED" ]; then git add who-we-are.md now.md memory/ diary/ 2>/dev/null; git commit -m 'Auto-commit: memory files updated' 2>/dev/null; if git remote get-url origin >/dev/null 2>&1; then git push 2>/dev/null && echo '✅ Memory files auto-pushed.' || echo '⚠️ Auto-push failed. Push manually.'; else echo '✅ Memory files auto-committed (no remote configured).'; fi; fi
